macro.title: Mortgage rates jump after Iran strike rattles markets
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Markets are starting to price in escalation with Iran, but not fully yet
macro.what: The 10-year yield at 4.09% still doesn’t price in the full escalation of the war, but it's starting to take this situation more seriously.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Redfin Economists’ Weekly Take: After Dipping Below 6%, Mortgage Rates Enter Unpredictable Week Amid Iran Tensions
macro.what: This Week In A Nutshell: We’re in for an unpredictable week with potentially significant moves in rates between the ongoing Iran conflict and important job market data on Friday
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: More Homeowners Have a Rate Above 6% Than a Rate Below 3% For the First Time in 5 Years
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Connecticut bill targets private real estate listings
housing.what: Connecticut Senate Bill 340 would mandate public marketing for listings unless sellers opt out, mirroring bills in three other states.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Rhode Island housing package targets zoning, parking and SROs
housing.what: Rhode Island, like other states nationwide, is grappling with a housing affordability crisis.​ State lawmakers are now on their sixth legislative package to strengthen efforts to improve housing affordability
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Direct Mortgage ex-employees sue over fraud and unpaid wages
housing.what: Two ex-employees of Direct Mortgage filed a suit seeking more than $750,000, alleging fraud and unpaid wages.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Green Brick Partners stands out with high margins, land-heavy approach
housing.what: Green Brick Partners kept a 29.4% gross margin in Q4 2025, but incentives rose to 9.2% and starts fell 14% year over year.
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: ‘Limitless’ in a time of uncertainty: LeadingRE’s Paul Boomsma’s message to brokerage leaders
housing.what: LeadingRE CEO Paul Boomsma told brokerage leaders the outlook is uncertain, with M&A, private listings and profit pressure in focus.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: The Typical U.S. Homeowner Hangs Onto Their House For 12 Years. In Los Angeles, It’s 20 Years.
housing.what: Homeowner tenure peaked at 13.4 years in 2020, roughly doubling the average tenure from 2005
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: West Palm Beach’s Luxury Housing Market Is Booming, With Sales Up 30%
housing.what: Luxury pending home sales in West Palm Beach posted a larger gain than any other major metro in January, rising almost six times faster than non luxury sales
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Redfin and Compass Partner to Expand Inventory and Seller Choice
housing.what: Today, Redfin announced a partnership with Compass International Holdings that will expand the number of homes buyers can discover on Redfin.com
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Denver Has a New Neighbor: Kiel Murphy Wins the Great American Home Search
housing.what: Redfin awards Murphy a home valued at more than $1 million for being the fastest person to successfully complete a nationwide scavenger hunt in the Redfin app Redfin today announce
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Stellar MLS transitions CEO role from Merri Jo Cowen to Shayne Fairley
notables.what: Merri Jo Cowen steps down as Stellar MLS CEO after 17 years, and COO Shayne Fairley takes over in the planned Q1 2026 transition.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: 6 deal-saving business & negotiation strategies from a $1.7 billion broker
notables.what: Compass' David Kramer shares the exact business and negotiation strategies he used to build one of LA's most successful real estate careers.
notables.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
notables.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

notables.title: RenoFi to expand AI-powered renovation financing after $22M Series B funding
notables.what: RenoFi closed a $22M Series B led by Fifth Wall, aiming to scale its AI renovation loan platform and expand its distributed retail team.
